creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 236803
crystal built with poudriere-devel on FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT

Hi Alain. I see <https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/85808/>, 


> lang/crystal fails build.

Please: which version of FreeBSD, now, exactly? 

Is your copy of the tree up-to-date with main?

Is an option specified for any associated port? 

Attached: a record of the port built on CURRENT.
